name: DNA Motif Finder
description: Find all starting positions of a short DNA motif within a larger sequence.

inputs.name: seq
inputs.description: DNA sequence to search. Accepts a resource name (e.g. 'pBR322') or a raw sequence string.

inputs.name: motif
inputs.description: Short DNA pattern to search for (e.g. 'GAATTC').

outputs.description: List of 1-based positions where the motif starts. Empty list if not found.
